brand.name: Mary Jane's Place
brand.tagline: A safe space for medical cannabis patients
brand.national: Located in Bournemouth. Serving medical cannabis patients across the UK.

facts.label: Of the UK public support medical prescribing

memberPerks.title: £5 vape hire
memberPerks.body: Use a clean, serviced dry-herb vaporiser for £5 a session. Try before you buy.

memberPerks.title: 10% off everything
memberPerks.body: Discount on every device, accessory and service we sell. Stacks with the loyalty programme.

memberPerks.title: Loyalty points
memberPerks.body: Earn 1 point per £1 spent on equipment and services. 100 points = £5 off your next visit.

memberPerks.title: Refer a friend
memberPerks.body: When someone you refer becomes a verified member, you both get £10 credit to spend.

memberPerks.title: Members-only events
memberPerks.body: Patient meet-ups, education evenings and partner showcases — priority booking for members.

memberPerks.title: The newsletter
memberPerks.body: Plain-English UK medical cannabis news, clinic updates and patient stories. Once a fortnight, never spam.

partnerCategories.title: Prescribing clinics
partnerCategories.blurb: We refer patients exploring a prescription, and give clinic patients a real-world place to use what's prescribed.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Co-branded patient education evenings, clinic-day pop-ups, referral pathways.

partnerCategories.title: Advocacy and community
partnerCategories.blurb: We work alongside the bodies driving reform — hosting events, amplifying patient voices.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Hosting UPA, PLEA, Cancard, Drug Science and Cannabis Industry Council activity in Bournemouth and beyond.

partnerCategories.title: Equipment and pharma
partnerCategories.blurb: We let patients try real devices in a real setting — one of the most valuable demo channels in the UK.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Vaporiser brands, accessory makers, dispensaries and licensed cultivators.

partnerCategories.title: Hospitality and venues
partnerCategories.blurb: If you run a venue and want to be patient-friendly, we'll share the operational playbook.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Hotels, restaurants, members' clubs, retreats and event organisers.

partnerCategories.title: Media and press
partnerCategories.blurb: We speak openly about patient experience, the law and what it looks like to live with a UK prescription.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Print, broadcast, podcast and online journalists.

partnerCategories.title: Future locations
partnerCategories.blurb: If you want to open a Mary Jane's Place in your city — talk to us.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Patient advocates, operators and investors in cities with active medical cannabis communities.
